time_independent_schrodinger_1d.name: Time-Independent Schrodinger Equation (1D)
time_independent_schrodinger_1d.description: H psi = E psi in one dimension. Set this expression equal to zero and solve for f(x) with an appropriate potential V.
time_independent_schrodinger_1d.search_text: Time-independent Schrodinger equation one dimension stationary state eigenvalue problem H psi equals E psi energy eigenfunction TISE standing wave bound state

time_dependent_schrodinger_1d.name: Time-Dependent Schrodinger Equation (1D)
time_dependent_schrodinger_1d.description: i*hbar * d psi/dt = H psi in 1D. Expression equals zero when the equation is satisfied.
time_dependent_schrodinger_1d.search_text: Time-dependent Schrodinger equation one dimension evolution dynamics propagation wavefunction time TDSE unitary evolution quantum dynamics

radial_schrodinger_equation.name: Radial Schrodinger Equation
radial_schrodinger_equation.description: Radial part of the 3D Schrodinger equation in spherical coordinates for R(r). Set equal to zero.
radial_schrodinger_equation.search_text: Radial Schrodinger equation spherical coordinates three dimensions centrifugal barrier effective potential central force angular momentum quantum number l

time_independent_schrodinger_3d.name: Time-Independent Schrodinger Equation (3D Cartesian)
time_independent_schrodinger_3d.description: H psi = E psi in three Cartesian dimensions. Set equal to zero. The Laplacian acts on psi(x,y,z).
time_independent_schrodinger_3d.search_text: Time-independent Schrodinger equation three dimensions 3D Cartesian Laplacian stationary state eigenvalue problem TISE three-dimensional

schrodinger_equation_momentum_space.name: Schrodinger Equation (Momentum Space, Free Particle)
schrodinger_equation_momentum_space.description: Free-particle Schrodinger equation in momentum representation. phi(p) is the momentum-space wavefunction. Set equal to zero.
schrodinger_equation_momentum_space.search_text: Schrodinger equation momentum space representation Fourier transform free particle momentum wavefunction p-space
